2603.19979.title: X-World: Controllable Ego-Centric Multi-Camera World Models for Scalable End-to-End Driving
2603.19979.paper_summary: Scalable and reliable evaluation is increasingly critical in the end-to-end era of autonomous driving, where vision--language--action (VLA) policies directly map raw sensor streams to driving actions. Yet, current evaluation pipelines still rely heavily on real-world road testing, which is costly, biased toward limited scenario coverage, and difficult to reproduce. These challenges motivate a real-world simulator that can generate realistic future observations under proposed actions, while remaining controllable and stable over long horizons. We present X-World, an action-conditioned multi-camera generative world model that simulates future observations directly in video space. Given synchronized multi-view camera history and a future action sequence, X-World generates future multi-camera video streams that follow the commanded actions. To ensure reproducible and editable scene rollouts, X-World further supports optional controls over dynamic traffic agents and static road elements, and retains a text-prompt interface for appearance-level control (e.g., weather and time of day). Beyond world simulation, X-World also enables video style transfer by conditioning on appearance prompts while preserving the underlying action and scene dynamics. At the core of X-World is a multi-view latent video generator designed to explicitly encourage cross-view geometric consistency and temporal coherence under diverse control signals. Experiments show that X-World achieves high-quality multi-view video generation with (i) strong view consistency across cameras, (ii) stable temporal dynamics over long rollouts, and (iii) high controllability with strict action following and faithful adherence to optional scene controls. These properties make X-World a practical foundation for scalable and reproducible evaluation.
2603.19979.paper_summary_zh: 可擴展且可靠的評估在自主駕駛的端到端時代中變得越來越重要，這裡的視覺-語言-行動（VLA）策略直接將原始傳感器數據映射到駕駛行動。<lb/>然而，目前的評估流程仍然在很大程度上依賴於現實世界的道路測試，這樣的測試成本高昂，且對有限場景的覆蓋存在偏見，並且難以重現。<lb/>這些挑戰促使我們開發一個現實世界模擬器，該模擬器可以在提出的行動下生成現實的未來觀察，同時在長期內保持可控和穩定。<lb/>我們提出了 X-World，一個基於行動條件的多攝影機生成世界模型，該模型直接在視頻空間中模擬未來觀察。<lb/>給定同步的多視角攝影機歷史和未來行動序列，X-World 生成遵循指令行動的未來多攝影機視頻流。<lb/>為了確保可重現和可編輯的場景展開，X-World 進一步支持對動態交通代理和靜態道路元素的可選控制，並保留文本提示界面以進行外觀級控制（例如，天氣和時間）。<lb/>除了世界模擬，X-World 還通過根據外觀提示進行條件處理來實現視頻風格轉換，同時保持底層行動和場景動態。<lb/>X-World 的核心是一個多視角潛在視頻生成器，旨在明確促進跨視角的幾何一致性和時間一致性，並在多樣的控制信號下運作。<lb/>實驗表明，X-World 實現了高質量的多視角視頻生成，具備（i）跨攝影機的強視角一致性，（ii）長期展開中的穩定時間動態，以及（iii）高可控性，能夠嚴格遵循行動並忠實遵循可選場景控制。<lb/>這些特性使 X-World 成為可擴展和可重現評估的實用基礎。
2603.19979.author: Chaoda Zheng et.al.
2603.19979.authors: Chaoda Zheng, Sean Li, Jinhao Deng, Zhennan Wang, Shijia Chen, Liqiang Xiao, Ziheng Chi, Hongbin Lin, Kangjie Chen, Boyang Wang, Yu Zhang, Xianming Liu
